document-information.notes.content.placeholder: Contains a description of a product given in the product_tree in regard to field of application and core functionality. This SHOULD be bound to the corresponding product or product group.

document-information.notes.content: Contains the only license text of the document license.

document-information.notes_templates.text: As general security measures, Example Company recommends minimizing network exposure of the devices, restricting network access and following recommended security practices in order to run the devices in a protected IT environment.

vulnerabilities.notes.default.title: Standard Vulnerability Description
vulnerabilities.notes.default.content: This is a default summary for a vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.notes_templates.title: Temporary Mitigation Strategy
vulnerabilities.notes_templates.content: Disable the affected port or interface via the firewall configuration rules.

vulnerabilities.notes_templates.title: Frequently Asked Questions
vulnerabilities.notes_templates.content:
Q: Is there a workaround?
A: Yes, see the remediation section.

vulnerabilities.title: Buffer Overflow in Network Parser Component

cwe.name: Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')

notes.title: CVE Description
notes.content: Contains the official and unchanged CVE description for this specific vulnerability.

notes.title: Preconditions for Exploitation
notes.content: The attacker must have network access to the affected service and be able to send crafted packets.

notes.title: Vulnerability Summary
notes.content: This vulnerability allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service or potentially execute arbitrary code via a crafted network packet.
